rationale.risk-routing: autonomy×impact tiers determine required human oversight/validation level

rationale.general-ai: domain-agnostic LLM use across engineering, not coding-specific

rationale.risk-overreliance: focal paragraph on overreliance eroding engineer knowledge/critical-thinking
